summary: NT Commerce 12.0 Iteration 69 - Post-Cleanup Regression Testing Complete. Backend: 34/34 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All pages load correctly. No regressions found after removing ~3,735 lines of duplicate code from server.py.
critical_code_review_comments: Post-cleanup verification successful - server.py reduced from 12,099 to 8,364 lines

All 10 extracted route modules working correctly: products_routes.py, customers_routes.py, sales_routes.py, purchases_routes.py, stats_routes.py, employees_routes.py, cashbox_routes.py, debts_routes.py, expenses_routes.py, daily_sessions_routes.py (NEW)
Daily sessions routes (newest extraction) tested: GET /api/daily-sessions, POST /api/daily-sessions, GET /api/daily-sessions/current all working
POST endpoints correctly return 201 (Created) status code - proper REST convention
All CRUD operations verified for Products and Customers
Regression tests passed for: smart-notifications, permissions/catalog, repairs/tickets, defective/stats, backup/stats/summary, wallet, warehouses, suppliers, product-families
seed_data_creation: Created test product and customer during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 route modules successfully extracted from server.py. Daily sessions is the newest extraction - requires {opening_cash, opened_at} for POST. Products require {name_en, name_ar, purchase_price, wholesale_price, retail_price, quantity}. Customers require {name, phone}. Server.py now at 8,364 lines (down from 12,099). All extracted routes use factory pattern: create_xxx_routes(db, get_current_user, get_tenant_admin, require_tenant).

frontend_pages./dashboard: PASS - Dashboard loads with stats (4 products, 5 customers, 1 supplier)
frontend_pages./products: PASS - Products page shows grid with products
frontend_pages./pos: PASS - POS page functional with Arabic RTL layout
frontend_pages./permissions: PASS - Permissions management page loads with user roles
